productDisplayName: Puma Unisex K9 Coffee Beige Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in the K9 floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers with woven straps on the forefoot and around ankles for comfort and protection Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tightening Diagonal fabric strap attached to the ankle straps from the forefoot strap Ankle straps padded lightly to avoid shoe bites cat logo on the ankle strap and the forefoot strap Midsole Cushioned foam footbed with fabric covering for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional pattern and scooped out grooves for superior grip and traction and better shock absorption Shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
